summary: Comprehensive analysis answering 5 strategic questions about Step 2a World Bible redesign. Covers: (1) What data should World Bible contain - proposes splitting into 3 domains: Historical Context, Faction Visual Bible, Environmental Visual Bible. (2) Output format recommendation - domain-based JSON for selective injection into downstream steps. (3) Input analysis - current sequence-based input is suboptimal, should use cleaned_text. (4) Character costume analysis - faction-level costumes belong here, individual costumes belong in Step 2b, proposes role_variants as bridge. (5) API call splitting - recommends 2-call architecture (Identify then Describe) for quality. Includes demand mapping table showing exactly which downstream step needs which field.
